chunks.title: The Threat Arrives
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival of the enemy coalition and Jehoshaphat's initial reaction.

chunks.title: Jehoshaphat's Prayer
chunks.reason: A continuous prayer where the king appeals to God's past faithfulness and current power.

chunks.title: Prophecy of Victory
chunks.reason: Jahaziel delivers a divine message assuring the people of God's intervention.

chunks.title: Worship and March
chunks.reason: The people respond to the prophecy with worship and prepare to march out.

chunks.title: Divine Victory and Spoils
chunks.reason: Details the miraculous defeat of the enemies and the gathering of their wealth.

chunks.title: Return to Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Describes the joyful return of the army and the resulting peace in the region.

chunks.title: King's Summary
chunks.reason: Provides a brief summary of Jehoshaphat's reign and character.

chunks.title: Alliance with Ahaziah
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a specific event showing a lapse in judgment and its consequence.
